attacking_style: Opportunistic rather than explosive attacker. Builds advantages through cumulative gains across stages rather than single decisive moves. Struggles to convert technical advantages in decisive moments.
team_tactics: Team support appears inconsistent, particularly in critical defensive scenarios. Unable to provide adequate protection in crosswind situations or maintain positioning when GC defense is required.
terrain_preference: Capable on varied terrain when conditions are controlled, but crosswinds and high-speed echelon situations expose significant vulnerabilities. Technical descents and second-half race execution are weak points.
vulnerability: Catastrophically weak in crosswinds and echelon splits. Cannot defend GC when team support falters. Struggles to convert advantageous positions into wins, suggesting finishing or tactical weaknesses in decisive moments.
key_patterns: Crosswind vulnerability: dropped over 2 minutes in exposed conditions, catastrophic GC defense failure
Second-half weakness: unable to convert checkpoint advantages, technical execution falters late
Team support dependency: GC defense collapses when domestique protection inadequate or absent
form_trajectory: negative: 2022 Paris-Nice showed complete collapse from defending champion status, losing over 2 minutes in crosswinds
